# ai-flashcard-generator

> **Daily Build** | 2026-05-23

## Description
Convert any text/PDF into Anki-compatible flashcards using OpenAI

## Stack
Python, openai, pdfplumber, csv

## Setup
```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
python main.py
```
